reason: This tweet has extremely high viral potential. The core event – a 12-year-old building a nuclear fusion machine – is absurd, astonishing, and highly memeable. It combines the 'prodigy' narrative with cutting-edge (and dangerous-sounding) technology, creating an irresistible hook. The mention of Guinness World Records further amplifies its appeal and recognition. The juxtaposition of '12-year-old' and 'nuclear fusion' is a perfect recipe for internet virality and widespread sharing.
